title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans and reckon with the implications of this development for the future.
